name: Fat-Free Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Spray a 9-inch square baking pan with cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a medium bowl, whisk together egg whites, water, and corn syrup.
5. Stir the egg mixture into the flour mixture until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
8. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
9. For the glaze, beat together cocoa, powdered sugar, vanilla extract, egg white, and water in small bowl by droplets.
10. Drizzle glaze over the warm cake.
11. To serve, cut into squares.
